spouse.name: Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton

zh.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton於1080年出生。他於1115年之前與Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1120年享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton于1080年出生。他于1115年之前与Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1120年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

variants.name: Varden
meanings: English: variant of   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: English:
metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.
variant of   Moulton  .

variants.name: Moulden
meanings: English: variant of   Moulton  .

variants.name: Molton
meanings: English: variant of   Moulton  .

nameMeanings.name: Ives
meanings: Brenton, Cornish: God's grace or God's gift

en.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton was born in 1080. He married Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton before 1115, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1120, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton est né en 1080. Il a épousé Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton avant 1115, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1120, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton wurde 1080 geboren. Er hat vor 1115 in Europa Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1120 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton è nato il nel 1080. Lui sposato Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton prima del 1115, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1120, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moultonは1080年に生まれた。1115年以前にヨーロッパでMrs Ives de Verdun of Moultonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1120年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton(은)는 1080년 태어났다. 그는 1115년 이전 우럽에서 Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1120년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton nasceu em 1080. Ele casou-se com Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton antes 1115, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1120, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton родился в 1080 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton перед 1115 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1120 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Ives de Verdun of Moulton nació en 1080. Se casó con Mrs Ives de Verdun of Moulton antes de 1115, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1120, a la edad de 40 años.
